name: ai-agent-manage
description: Native (no-Docker) launcher for trello-clone + claude-code-runner + ai-assistant

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix trello-clone install && npm --prefix claude-code-runner install && npm --prefix ai-assistant install
scripts.clean: rm -rf trello-clone/dist trello-clone/node_modules claude-code-runner/node_modules ai-assistant/node_modules ai-assistant/dist
